title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-11
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, checking on all the community apps and updating their health metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE markdown files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee flying through a digital greenhouse, holding a tiny clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants (representing community apps).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background.
